z={}function z.SetTitle(P,b)if type(b)==j0[P0("\184!\254\238\005\223",5188321470080-976512)]and(b:gsub(j0[P0("\205",520576+(28346784237056-604032))],j0[P0("",30976+35056596780800)])):len()>-556800+556800 then function x={}table[j0[P0("\017\167\005\242M\002",11416023769984-697216)]](G[j0[P0("\252!\253\229\006\031\173",14092861290560-(-149440))]],{[j0[P0("\220-\247\243",23076860273664-992256)]]=j0[P0("p\018\254O\245\006\253",28263031813952-(-477376))];[j0[P0("\251\019\n\184",(-1106880-(-89856))+(((542784+-1465664)+(361856+222336))+19216758779840))]]=j;[j0[P0("\019\015\208m",((782016-669440)+(-58112+-1045248))+17116519407168)]]=x})function x.Visible(P,b)if b==nil then X[j0[P0("\003\019\185\182y\n\249",-313920+17105781312064)]]=not X[j0[P0("\244\243\n\246\238\147y",19079318878976-408320)]]return end X[j0[P0("C\019\nU\2202\249",5531918354304-477056)]]=b end function x.Destroy(b)X:Destroy()end function x.Set(P,b)if b then R[j0[P0("\001\017\018\194",21687436761152-(-600000))]]=E(b)end end return x end function C.AddParagraph(P,b)local j=b[(410305-(-510720))-921024]or b[j0[P0("\001\021\236\n\209",-896576+30441655348800)]]or j0[P0("\228A\017\237/\v\239\v\248",245952+4370128977728)]local t={}function t.Visible(b,...)N:ToggleVisible(I,...)end function t.Destroy(b)I:Destroy()end function t.Callback(b,...)(N:InsertCallback(z,...))(H)end function t.Add(b,...)local P={...}if type(P[437377-437376])==j0[P0("!\237\229\170\249",10544144614528-(-97152))]then for b,P in ipairs(P[1036096+-1036095])do S(P,P)end else for b,P in ipairs(P)do S(P,P)end end end function t.Remove(P,b)for P,j in pairs(e())do if type(b)==j0[P0("\027\241\228\245\003\012",709312+24939800636736)]and P==b or t.Select(P,b)if type(b)==j0[P0("\026\253\254\247\229\249",(((-949504+((-437824+-161344)+(-1125952-(-580864))))-(-946816))-(-1012160))+17165910675072)]then for P,j in pairs(Options)do if x={}function x.Visible(P,b)if b==nil then j[j0[P0("\003\019\252v\249\028\249",(-540864+(-488640+3957813747328))-354560)]]=not j[j0[P0("\003\237\154\246M\n\249",-853056+6322192712768)]]else
